meta.source: SIS DataHub 2025 Points Saved, REWEIGHTED onto 2026 rosters (accounting reweight, not a refit)
meta.method: Each confirmed 2026 mover carries their FULL 2025 Points Saved to their 2026 team; RETIRED/UFA subtract only; "2 teams" players assign combined PS to their 2026 team; rookies/incoming-with-no-2025-data add NOTHING (replacement-level floor). 32-team percentiles recomputed per unit.

fields.*_2026: 2026-roster-adjusted strength/pctl (canonical, used by the matchup engine)
fields.*_pctl: league percentile across 32 teams (0-100, higher=better unit)
fields.top_*: top-3 contributors per unit on the 2026 roster
fields.moves_2026: applied 2026 roster moves (player, from->to, unit, ps, source, conf)

assumptions: Default: a player STAYS on his 2025 team unless a CONFIRMED move was found.
Rookies/incoming players with no 2025 SIS data add nothing (honest replacement-level floor).
RETIRED/UFA-unsigned: production leaves the league (subtract only).
Low-confidence moves (conf=false): Kevin Byard->NE, Dre'Mont Jones->NE, K'Lavon Chaisson->WAS (sources disagreed).

moves_2026.note: CB re-routed/retained BAL (was on BAL roster)
